name: Bethany
oracleText:
Bethany enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {G}.
{2}{W}{G}, {T}: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional. Classics theme art uses Charles de La Fosse's "Christ in the House of Martha and Mary" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: House of Friendship

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Charles de La Fosse, Christ in the House of Martha and Mary
classics.sourceNotes: Bethany is best evoked through the household scene most associated with it.
